title: Week in Politics: Does Trump have political support for his actions in Iran?
description: We look at what President Trump's decision to attack Iran means, what kind of support he has in Iran and what this moment means for his administration.
content: We look at what President Trump's decision to attack Iran means, what kind of support he has in Iran and what this moment means for his administration.
